mapper.select: select db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_columns, pk_data_type, imatable_name, masterkey, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, totalcnt, wherestr, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piiconftable order by db desc, seq1, seq2, seq3;
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiconftable (db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_columns, pk_data_type, imatable_name, masterkey, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, totalcnt, wherestr, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_columns, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imatable_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{masterkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiconftable set db= #{db}, owner= #{owner}, table_name= #{table_name}, pagitype= #{pagitype}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail}, archiveflag= #{archiveflag}, status= #{status}, preceding= #{preceding}, succedding= #{succedding}, seq1= #{seq1}, seq2= #{seq2}, seq3= #{seq3}, pipeline= #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_columns= #{pk_columns}, pk_data_type= #{pk_data_type}, imatable_name= #{imatable_name}, masterkey= #{masterkey}, where_col= #{where_col}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name}, parallelcnt= #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, totalcnt= #{totalcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wherestr= #{wherestr}, upddate= SYSDATE, reguserid= #{reguserid}, upduserid= #{upduserid} where db= #{db} and owner= #{owner} and table_name= #{table_name}
